description: You are a GRC/Compliance Engineer at a financial services company preparing for a PCI DSS assessment. Demonstrate that Wazuh implements the audit log monitoring controls required by PCI DSS Requirement 10 (Track and Monitor All Access to Network Resources and Cardholder Data). Deploy a custom Security Configuration Assessment (SCA) policy YAML file to the Wazuh shared directory featuring at least 5 distinct compliance checks targeting Requirement 10 controls, such as audit logging, integrity monitoring, time synchronization, and authentication tracking. Configure email alerting in ossec.conf and implement at least two custom detection rules (severity 10 or higher) to identify Requirement 10 violations. Save a compliance evidence report of at least 800 characters documenting the implemented controls and mapping them to sub-requirements 10.1 through 10.7 to /home/ga/Desktop/pci_compliance_report.txt. Access the Wazuh dashboard at https://localhost using the username admin and password SecretPassword.
